title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.826 - CPL Ben Cooper memorial bridge designated for bridge on Loop 44/Range Line Road in city of Joplin
text:
227.826.  CPL Ben Cooper memorial bridge designated for bridge on Loop 44/Range Line Road in city of Joplin. — The bridge on Loop 44/Range Line Road crossing over the Kansas City Southern Railroad in the city of Joplin in Newton County shall be designated the "CPL Ben Cooper Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2023 S.B. 127)
